title: brassia helenae
intro: Brassia helenae, also known as the Helen's Vanda, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Brassia helenae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
